title: That's My Gal
writer: Frances Hyland, Bernard Feins, Joseph Hoffman
actors: Lynne Roberts, Don 'Red' Barry, Pinky Lee
plot: Two sharpie promoters (Don Barry and Frank Jenks) put on a show they believe is so bad it will not play more than one day and they therefore will not have to pay the long list of investors,i.e, suckers and buyers. But one of the i...
